test_cases.description: User submits task with clear approach, all 5 elements present after framing
test_cases.input: User says: 'Tôi cần làm báo cáo tài chính Q1 cho CFO. Approach: tôi sẽ pull data từ ERP, phân tích variance so budget, tổng hợp thành slide deck. Assumptions: data Q1 đã close, CFO muốn xem trước 15/4, format PPTX.'
test_cases.expected_output: Framed brief with all 5 elements scored ≥2, saved to 01_active_projects/{id}/project-brief.md with Genesis Header. 1 assumption challenged. SKH-01 + SKH-05 signals extracted.
test_cases.pass_criteria: Output file exists at correct path. Contains sections: Objective, Stakeholders+DoD, Assumptions (≥3), Scope IN/OUT, Measurable DoD. Genesis Header present. Aggregate score ≥12.

test_cases.description: User submits task WITHOUT stating approach first
test_cases.input: User says: 'Làm giúp tôi báo cáo Q1'
test_cases.expected_output: REJECT. Response: 'Trước tiên, approach của bạn với task này là gì?' No brief created. No skill signals extracted.
test_cases.pass_criteria: No project-brief.md created. Rejection message contains 'approach'. user_approach_stated remains false. bypass_count NOT incremented (this is a legitimate block, not a bypass).
